chapter_title.en: The Method of Ghusl for Janabah (ritual Bath for Sexual impurity)

text: 180 - وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: «أَنَا أَنَامُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ حَتَّى أُصْبِحَ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَعُودَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.180 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
'I sleep in that state (of janabah) until morning because I intend to return (to intimacy).'.
